rationale: Educ. Code §49.204 governs student transfers and local revenue levels relative to entitlement. It does not reference or depend on the homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b). No direct conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 49.204. TRANSFERS. (a) The board of trustees of a school district with a local revenue level in excess of entitlement may reduce the district's local revenue level by serving nonresident students who transfer to the district and are educated by the district but who are not charged tuition.
_note: No textual or operational linkage between the homestead exemption amount and the transfer provisions in §49.204.
